title: Implement host-side cluster helper per ADR-0030 (steps 1-5)
body:
## Summary

### Devloop 1: 2026-04-07-cluster-ports-from-env
- ADR-0030 step 1: `ClusterPorts::from_env()` reads env-test URLs with localhost fallback
- Verdicts: Security CLEAR, Test CLEAR, Observability CLEAR, Code Quality RESOLVED, DRY CLEAR, Operations CLEAR

### Devloop 2: 2026-04-08-devloop-helper-binary
- ADR-0030 step 4: Compiled Rust helper binary at `crates/devloop-helper/`
- Unix socket API with streaming stdout/stderr (JSONL), 32-byte CSPRNG auth, exhaustive service enum
- 99 tests including 13 socket-level injection regression tests
- Verdicts: Security CLEAR/RESOLVED, Test RESOLVED, Observability RESOLVED, Code Quality RESOLVED, DRY RESOLVED, Operations RESOLVED

### Devloop 3: 2026-04-08-devloop-sh-integration
- ADR-0030 step 5: devloop.sh integration with helper binary
- `devloop.sh`: build helper on first use, launch as background process, bind-mount runtime dir, orphan cluster detection, extended cleanup
- `Dockerfile`: added kubectl (pinned, sha256 verified) and socat
- `dev-cluster`: new shell client CLI using jq+socat for safe socket communication
- `commands.rs`: kubeconfig generation with server address rewriting for container access
- Backward compatible via `command -v kind` gate
- Verdicts: Security RESOLVED, Test RESOLVED, Observability RESOLVED, Code Quality RESOLVED, DRY CLEAR, Operations RESOLVED

## Test plan
- [x] `cargo test --workspace` — all tests pass (99 in devloop-helper)
- [x] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` — clean
- [x] All 16 guards pass
- [x] Semantic guard: PASS (all iterations)
- [x] Manual: build release binary on host, verify socket creation and auth token
- [ ] Manual: `./devloop.sh --rebuild` to rebuild image with kubectl+socat
- [ ] Manual: run devloop, use `dev-cluster setup` to create Kind cluster
- [ ] Manual: verify kubeconfig written and kubectl works inside container
- [ ] Manual: run `shellcheck infra/devloop/devloop.sh infra/devloop/dev-cluster` on host
- [ ] Manual: run `hadolint infra/devloop/Dockerfile` on host

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
